lastAssistantMessage:
Implemented the follow-up fixes.

The bootstrap pane now uses an Ink-based setup UI in [paneBootstrapRunner.ts](/Users/justinschroeder/Projects/dmux/.dmux/worktrees/dmux-slowness-codex/src/utils/paneBootstrapRunner.ts:80), with a bordered progress panel, step states, active command/status text, and clearer failure output.

I also fixed the “treated like a shell” race:

- New panes are immediately titled with an internal `dmux-bootstrap:<slug>` marker in [paneCreation.ts](/Users/justinschroeder/Projects/dmux/.dmux/worktrees/dmux-slowness-codex/src/utils/paneCreation.ts:344).
- Shell detection now ignores those bootstrap-marked panes in [shellPaneDetection.ts](/Users/justinschroeder/Projects/dmux/.dmux/worktrees/dmux-slowness-codex/src/utils/shellPaneDetection.ts:126).
- The bootstrap runner explicitly restores the final tmux pane title before setup and again before launching the agent, using the saved worktree pane title from the bootstrap config.
- Added [shellPaneDetection.test.ts](/Users/justinschroeder/Projects/dmux/.dmux/worktrees/dmux-slowness-codex/__tests__/shellPaneDetection.test.ts:1) to cover the race where a bootstrap pane could otherwise be misclassified as a shell.

Verification passed:

```bash
pnpm run typecheck
pnpm run test
```

Full suite: `92 passed | 1 skipped`, `533 passed | 11 skipped`.

`.codex/` is still untracked and untouched.
